experiment_title: 银镜反应的制备与观察

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="银镜反应的制备与观察" goal="制备银氨溶液并通过乙醛还原生成银镜，观察银镜的形成过程" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="test_tube_clamp_1" type="clamp" />
      <Component id="waste_container_1" type="container" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="AgNO3_solution_2pct" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NH3_H2O_2pct" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="CH3CHO" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="tap_water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="AgNO3" volume="1 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder_1" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NH3" volume="dropwise" tool="dropper_1" id="step_1" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="CH3CHO" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_1" id="step_3" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_4" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_clamp_1" id="step_5" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="beaker_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="sufficient for water bath" id="step_6" />
      <Heat vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_8" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="test_tube_1" to_vessel="waste_container_1" volume="all" id="step_9" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2O" volume="sufficient for rinsing" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_11" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在试管中加入硝酸银溶液，并滴加氨水至生成银氨溶液，静置使反应充分。
向银氨溶液中加入乙醛作为还原剂，并充分混合。
将试管固定在试管夹上，设置水浴并加热以促进银镜反应的发生。
将反应后的混合物倒入废液容器，使用水冲洗试管以观察银镜效果。
